title: Magnolia
description: Dreams, nightmares, and a world with far too many secrets held from you
body:
![A top-down view of a minecraft world as a banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4413772e04a114f28770409d3d36af608c4f40f2_0.webp)
**Magnolia** is a 1.21.1 magic modpack focusing on world dynamics and interaction.


<details>
<summary>⚠️ Before You Play...</summary>
Magnolia is not a finished modpack, and does not currently reflect the final state I wish to see it in. It is still playable, some things just might not work as intended. You may find features that are broken, unpolished, or otherwise incomplete. The pack contains several mods and features that are not stable yet, and you may encounter strange happenings. Please report any all issues you find.
</details>



It was made with multiplayer in mind, built specifically for **Hyacinth**, the sister server of the pack. Keystone features and ideas of the pack include:
- **Esoterica**: You are expected to figure things out on your _own_, or with the help of friends. Many mechanics in the pack completely deviate from how they function in Vanilla (or even modded!) There are no quests or tutorials, and only a few things to guide you—learn with time.
- **Challenging Simplicity**: You're meant to have a reason to go out and explore the world, but only once you're ready. The pack is by no means a cakewalk.
- **Variety**: Progression is more varied than Iron -> Diamond -> Netherite. The enchants you choose and the tools you bring matter far more.

<details>
<summary>Pack Performance</summary>

  * Allocate atleast 4 GB of ram to Minecraft. Singleplayer can be very RAM hungry, and if you can, allocate 6-8 GB.
  * If you have a bad PC or are running Minecraft on a HDD, remove Distant Horizons.
</details>
